creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 157224
Proposed patch (since 383856 revision)

Patch to update games/oolite port from 1.80 to 1.82 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/OoliteProject/oolite/blob/1.82/Doc/CHANGELOG.TXT
https://github.com/OoliteProject/oolite/releases/tag/1.82
http://aegidian.org/bb/viewtopic.php?f=1&t=17481

- Convert to USES=gnustep
- Use compiler from ports in case of LLVM/Clang v3.4.1, because of errors
- Wrap cd related commands to parentheses
- Remove patches, which were fixed upstream
- Adapt patches in files directory, after ports r383894 changes for ports-mgmt/portlint v2.16.3
